div.p: Offset Field Size Description ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── 0x00 enabled 4 1=filter active, 0=trace all 0x04 filter_pid 4 PID to match (0=any) 0x08 filter_dport 2 Dest port to match (0=any) 0x0A filter_sport 2 Src port to match (0=any) 0x0C filter_daddr[16] 16 Dest IP prefix to match 0x1C filter_saddr[16] 16 Src IP prefix to match 0x2C daddr_mask 1 CIDR prefix (0=any, 24=/24) 0x2D saddr_mask 1 CIDR prefix (0=any) 0x2E family 1 AF_INET/AF_INET6 for filter 0x2F pad 1 Alignment padding ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── Total: 48 bytes (0x30)

struct filter_config { u32 enabled; // 0x00 u32 filter_pid; // 0x04 u16 filter_dport; // 0x08 u16 filter_sport; // 0x0A u8 filter_daddr[16];// 0x0C u8 filter_saddr[16];// 0x1C u8 daddr_mask; // 0x2C u8 saddr_mask; // 0x2D u8 family; // 0x2E u8 pad; // 0x2F }; // Total: 48 bytes
